title: MISO LMP Real Time Hourly Ex Post Final CSV download
description:
Final, hourly, real-time, Ex Post, LMPs from MISO. MISO integrates the real-time Ex Post LMP over all dispatch intervals in a market hour in order to produce the hourly value. MISO's real-time market is settled on the hourly Ex post LMPs.

The Final values are not available immediately in real-time, but calculated via an offline process throughout the operating day and into the next day.

See MISO's *BPM 002 - Energy and Operating Reserves* for additional discussion.
